text: NVIDIA maintains a robust balance sheet with strong liquidity and conservative leverage. As of FY2026, current assets totaled $125,605,000,000 [72e56d8c-e080-4b6a-9589-a1f25d2e6b7c] against current liabilities of $32,163,000,000 [72e56d8c-e080-4b6a-9589-a1f25d2e6b7c], implying a current ratio of approximately 3.9x. Total debt stood at $11,412,000,000 [72e56d8c-e080-4b6a-9589-a1f25d2e6b7c] versus stockholders' equity of $157,293,000,000 [72e56d8c-e080-4b6a-9589-a1f25d2e6b7c], indicating a debt-to-equity ratio of approximately 0.07x. For reference, FY2023 metrics showed a current ratio of 3.52 [dcf4279e-1371-4751-bd24-4e95f04e04d6] and debt-to-equity of 0.54 [3477fe4d-1239-44a2-890f-559a5bc428f3], suggesting the balance sheet has strengthened considerably. Net debt was $8,642,000,000 in FY2023 [b3dbd66d-086c-4370-b308-440bfd31dc76], but with FY2026 cash and equivalents of $10,605,000,000 [72e56d8c-e080-4b6a-9589-a1f25d2e6b7c] plus short-term investments of $51,951,000,000 [72e56d8c-e080-4b6a-9589-a1f25d2e6b7c], the company appears to hold a net cash position.
